I stopped by Hector's Cafe & Diner for coffee during a walk in the Meatpacking District. The place has an authentic traditional diner atmosphere. The coffee was good and the service was quick and friendly. Perfect for a quick break in an environment that recalls the New York of yesteryear

Classic Diner Food.  Holding Out in a rapidly gentrifying spot.  Tucked under the Highline in the Meatpacking District. I had the Spanish Omelet ($15) and a Cappuccino.  Good service.  Average value.  Clean.  Big multipage menu.  Breakfast all day.  I will go back.
